task_completion.description: Generate the release keystore with the specified alias and certificate details.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal showing a 'keytool -genkey' command or Android Studio GUI 'Generate Signed Bundle or APK' dialog creating 'release-keystore.jks' with alias 'weather-release-key' and certificate details like CN='Weather App Team' and O='CloudView Inc'.

task_completion.description: Configure the release signing configuration in app/build.gradle.kts.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Text editor or IDE showing 'app/build.gradle.kts' with a 'signingConfigs' block containing a 'release' configuration that specifies the storeFile, storePassword, keyAlias, and keyPassword.

task_completion.description: Apply the signing configuration to the release build type and disable minification.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Text editor or IDE showing 'app/build.gradle.kts' with a 'buildTypes' block where the 'release' type has 'signingConfig = signingConfigs.getByName("release")' (or similar) and 'isMinifyEnabled = false'.
Terminal showing the execution and successful completion of './gradlew assembleRelease' (or similar Gradle command), or Android Studio 'Build Output' window showing a successful release build.

task_completion.description: Create signing_report.txt with the required paths and alias.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Text editor or terminal output showing the contents of 'signing_report.txt' with three lines: 1) absolute path to the keystore, 2) 'weather-release-key', and 3) absolute path to the generated release APK.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent actually built the APK using Gradle or Android Studio.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show Gradle build logs, a terminal running the build command, or the Android Studio build tool window, rather than just creating the report file without building.

integrity.description: Verify that the keystore was genuinely generated using a tool.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with 'keytool' in the terminal or the Android Studio keystore generation wizard, not just a touch command to create an empty file.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent used the actual absolute paths of the environment in the report.
integrity.visual_evidence: The paths in 'signing_report.txt' should start with '/home/ga/AndroidStudioProjects/WeatherApp' and not be generic placeholders.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The project directory is '/home/ga/AndroidStudioProjects/WeatherApp'. The keystore must be named 'release-keystore.jks'. The key alias is 'weather-release-key'. The certificate must have CN='Weather App Team' and O='CloudView Inc'. The generated release APK should be located in 'app/build/outputs/apk/release' relative to the project directory.
